case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF VS. SAN FRANCISO CAR WASH COMPANY, LLC DBA WINNING

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISO CAR WASH COMPANY, LLC DBA WINNING FINISH CAR WASH JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISO CAR WASH COMPANY, LLC DBA WINNING FINISH CAR WASH $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
